ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distribution Of The Reserve
Off Calendar Sep-28-2021 Continued To May-24-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Avid Alavi, via ZOOM, for Andrea Leung, Trustee.

The court requests an update regarding the reserve and states concerns regarding distribution and pending tax filings. Ms. Alavi provides history of case and advises that there have been issues with translation with the beneficiary in Japan. Ms. Alavi also reports that the CPA has numbers for 2019 and 2020 and wanted to wait until tax returns are filed for 2021 to complete the accounting. Ms. Alavi then provides additional testimony regarding the reserve. The court instructs Ms. Alavi to submit an order regarding the draw-down of the reserve to the court and to contact the assigned Examiner to submit the order via email.

The Status on Distribution of The Reserve is continued to May-24-2022 at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: C. Andam. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distribution Of The Reserve
Off Calendar Aug-10-2021 Continued To Sep-28-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distribution Of The Reserve
Off Calendar Jul-06-2021 Continued To Aug-10-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Avid Alavi, via ZOOM, for Andrea Leung, Trustee.

Counsel begins by reporting that the reserve authorized by the court has been withheld for tax purposes and the CPA that she is working with still needs to file taxes for 2021. Counsel also reports that there remains tangible, personal property held in a storage unit and that there has been an attempt to sell some of those items however, the beneficiary has advised that they might be willing to submit to donating remaining items to vacate the storage unit. Counsel then reports that it is likely that distributions from the reserve will be made and that a small amount will be withheld to pay taxes.

After additional discussion, the Status on Distribution is continued to August 10, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204. The court advises Ms. Alavi to file a declaration regarding the status of this matter by no later than July 27, 2021.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: C. Lee. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distribution Of The Reserve
Off Calendar Jun-08-2021 Continued To Jul-06-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Dec-01-2020 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #3, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-25-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Avid Alavi appeared by zoom for and with Andrea Leung (Trustee) by zoom.

Ms. Alavi addressed the issues raised in the Probate Examiner's notes stating that the funds are in one account, that they were thinking that distribution would be done as soon as possible, and that the funds are secure and are there. Ms. Alavi also stated that as soon as this is approved, they will make distribution to the sole Beneficiary. The Court stated that keeping the funds in one account is very unwise and that it is really concerned. Ms. Alavi stated that her Client apologizes, that it won't happen again, that her Client would have had to open multiple accounts at different banks, that it would have been difficult, and that she understands it is not an excuse. The Court stated that the fee analysis will be under CRC 7.776, and that it will balance the considerations and come with a figure. Ms. Alavi stated that the supplement she filed on August 18th is pretty comprehensive, that her Client worked very hard, that the sole Beneficiary received notice, that no one is objecting and that her Client sold the property. Ms. Alavi also stated that her Client bears the sole responsibility and liability, that there are a number of tangible personal property that need to be dealt with and that the final fiduciary returns for 2020 will need to be done. In addition, Ms. Alavi stated that she believes the 1% fee will cover trying to sell the personal property, the post accounting taxes and distribution of the reserve. The Third and Final Account and Report of Trustee and Petition for Its Settlement, etc. is under submission. Status on distribution of the reserve is set for June 8, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (25 Sierra Street #404, San Francisco, Ca 94107)
Off Calendar Aug-12-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Avid Alavi for Andrea Leung (Trustee).

The Court noted that it received the re-appraisal and that it came in at $1,420,000.00. The sale was confirmed at $1,400,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed July 9, 2019. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $1,330,000.00 is required.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
